description: Payment processing server for creating payment intents, managing customers, processing refunds, and retrieving charge history through the Stripe API.

tools.name: create_payment_intent
tools.description: Create a PaymentIntent to collect payment from a customer.

amount.description: Amount to charge in the smallest currency unit (e.g., cents for USD, yen for JPY).

currency.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code in lowercase (e.g., 'usd', 'eur', 'gbp').

customer_id.description: The unique identifier of an existing Stripe customer to associate with this payment.

payment_method_id.description: The unique identifier of a saved payment method to use for this payment.

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs to attach additional information to this payment intent.

id.description: The unique identifier of the created PaymentIntent.

client_secret.description: Secret key used by the client to confirm the payment on the frontend.

status.description: Current status of the payment intent (e.g., 'requires_payment_method', 'succeeded', 'canceled').

amount.description: Amount to charge in the smallest currency unit (e.g., cents for USD, yen for JPY).

currency.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code in lowercase (e.g., 'usd', 'eur', 'gbp').

created.description: Unix timestamp indicating when the PaymentIntent was created.

tools.name: retrieve_payment_intent
tools.description: Retrieve the complete details of an existing PaymentIntent.

payment_intent_id.description: The unique identifier of the PaymentIntent to retrieve.

id.description: The unique identifier of the PaymentIntent.

client_secret.description: Secret key used by the client to confirm the payment on the frontend.

status.description: Current status of the payment intent (e.g., 'requires_payment_method', 'succeeded', 'canceled').

amount.description: Amount to charge in the smallest currency unit (e.g., cents for USD, yen for JPY).

currency.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code in lowercase (e.g., 'usd', 'eur', 'gbp').

customer.description: The unique identifier of the Stripe customer associated with this payment.

payment_method.description: The unique identifier of the payment method used for this payment.

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs attached to this payment intent.

created.description: Unix timestamp indicating when the PaymentIntent was created.

tools.name: create_customer
tools.description: Create a new customer record for storing payment methods and managing recurring billing.

email.description: The email address of the customer.

name.description: The full name of the customer.

phone.description: The phone number of the customer.

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs to attach additional information to this customer.

id.description: The unique identifier of the created Stripe customer.

email.description: The email address of the customer.

name.description: The full name of the customer.

created.description: Unix timestamp indicating when the customer was created.

tools.name: create_refund
tools.description: Create a refund for a previously completed payment.

payment_intent_id.description: The unique identifier of the PaymentIntent to refund.

amount.description: Amount to refund in the smallest currency unit. If omitted, the full payment amount will be refunded.

reason.description: Reason for the refund. Must be one of: 'duplicate', 'fraudulent', or 'requested_by_customer'.

id.description: The unique identifier of the created refund.

amount.description: Amount refunded in the smallest currency unit (e.g., cents for USD, yen for JPY).

tools.name: list_charges
tools.description: Retrieve a list of payment charges with optional filtering by customer.

limit.description: Maximum number of charge records to return (1-100, defaults to 10).

customer_id.description: The unique identifier of an existing Stripe customer to filter charges by.

charges.description: List of charge objects matching the specified filters.

id.description: The unique identifier of the charge.

amount.description: Amount charged in the smallest currency unit (e.g., cents for USD, yen for JPY).

currency.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code in lowercase (e.g., 'usd', 'eur', 'gbp').

customer.description: The unique identifier of the Stripe customer associated with this charge.

created.description: Unix timestamp indicating when the charge was created.
